body_txt: An excuse for rape, used by a character. Used in at least three situations:  There are real people who believe these things make rape into not-rape, or at least make it excusable. The law doesn't see it that way, and a person whose morals really justify violating a person's consent for fun is hardly moral at all, never mind how the victim feels. Do not confuse with "rape fantasy ", which is exactly that - a fantasy situation acted out by two (or more) parties with mutual consent . This trope is about the situation where the rapist and/or outsiders deny that it was a rape at all, because the victim became physically aroused or climaxed. Just because someone is into this kind of fantasy roleplay does not mean they are "asking for it." Unfortunately, this trope will often lead to Double Standard: Rape, Female on Male . Turns up often in Hentai, Boys' Love Genre and Fanfiction . A lot. noreallife
